import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useAuth } from "../context/AuthContext"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import "./AdminDashboard.css"; const StatCard = ({ title, value, icon, trend, color }) => (
{icon}

{title}

{value}
{trend &&
0 ? 'up' : 'down'}`}> {trend > 0 ? '↑' : '↓'} {Math.abs(trend)}% from last month
}
); const AdminDashboard = () => { const { currentUser } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("overview"); useEffect(() => { if (!currentUser || currentUser.email !== "karthikfuels@gmail.com") { navigate("/"); } }, [currentUser, navigate]); if (!currentUser || currentUser.email !== "karthikfuels@gmail.com") return null; return (
🏥 Admin Panel

Welcome, Admin {currentUser.displayName || "Karthik"}

{currentUser.email}
A

Recent Appointments

Patient Doctor Date Time Status
John Doe Dr. Smith Apr 20, 2024 10:30 AM Confirmed
Jane Smith Dr. Jones Apr 21, 2024 02:15 PM Pending
Mike White Dr. Wilson Apr 22, 2024 09:00 AM Cancelled

System Alerts

Server maintenance scheduled for midnight.
New doctor "Dr. Brown" verified.
Database backup completed successfully.
); }; export default AdminDashboard;
